title: Intoxicating liquor" defined
doc_html:
§1424.  "Intoxicating liquor" defined

As used in the compact, the term "intoxicating liquor" with reference to this state shall mean alcoholic beverages.

Added by Acts 1968, No. 273, §16; Acts 1968, No. 296, §1.
doc_text:
§1424.  "Intoxicating liquor" defined
As used in the compact, the term "intoxicating liquor" with reference to this state shall mean alcoholic beverages.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 273, §16; Acts 1968, No. 296, §1.
